subcodes.title: Instructions for delivery of Tablet to Muhammad Shah
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto that Lord Who, through the transcendent manifestation of His mercy, hath singled out His loved ones through tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو العلی الاعلی. حمد خداوندی را سزاوار است که از علو ظهور رحمت خود مخصوص گردانید اولیاء خود را بمصائب
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
